title: School pickup rotation — proposed schedule for the rest of April
summary: Three-week rotation starting Monday, balancing Boris and Rachel's calendars against Pip's after-school clubs and Pickle's nap window.
body_html:
School pickup rotation

This proposal covers the three school weeks from Monday April 14 through Friday May 2. It tries to honor four constraints simultaneously: Pip's Tuesday/Thursday after-school art club, Pickle's 1:30pm nap, Boris's Wednesday afternoon block of focus time, and Rachel's two-day on-site week alternating with the rest of the team.

The shape of the week

Pip leaves Lincoln Elementary at 3:15pm on most days. Tuesdays and Thursdays she stays for art club and finishes at 4:30pm. Pickup matters most on the days the club doesn't run, because the parking lot is calmer if you arrive within ten minutes of the bell.

Rachel's office days are currently Tuesday and Thursday, which is a soft conflict with the art-club days but a hard conflict with the regular-pickup days. Boris's Wednesday focus block is non-negotiable. That leaves Mondays and Fridays as the variables.

Week one (April 14-18)

  • Monday: Boris picks up. Pickle is already at home with the sitter from 12:30, so the only window to protect is Pip at 3:15.
  • Tuesday: Rachel finishes early at the office, picks up at 4:30 from art club.
  • Wednesday: Boris (Pip at 3:15). The Wednesday focus block ends at 3:00 — tight but doable.
  • Thursday: Sitter handles 4:30 art-club pickup. Both parents working through the afternoon.
  • Friday: Rachel picks up, then takes Pip to the library before dinner.

Week two (April 21-25)

Mirror of week one but with the Monday and Friday slots swapped. The intent is to give each parent a recurring slot that's predictable two weeks out, while still rotating the harder days.

Week three (April 28 - May 2)

Same as week one. By the end of the third cycle we'll know whether the rotation actually fits into Boris's Wednesday block, or whether we need to push his focus time earlier in the day.

Things I'm not sure about

Pickle starts at the new daycare on April 22. The drop-off is on Boris's commute, so Tuesdays and Thursdays are likely fine, but if the new schedule pushes drop-off later than 8:30 we'll need to revisit. I'll check in after the first week.

Effective hours summary

DayPickupTimeOwner
MonPip3:15pmBoris
TuePip (art)4:30pmRachel
WedPip3:15pmBoris
ThuPip (art)4:30pmSitter
FriPip3:15pmRachel

What I need from you

  1. Confirm the Wednesday Boris slot is realistic given the focus block. If not, we can swap with Friday and have Rachel run Wednesdays.
  2. Tell me whether the sitter is OK with the Thursday 4:30 art-club run for the next three weeks.
  3. Decide whether week two should mirror week one or fully invert. I lean mirror because predictability helps the calendar but I'll defer.

If anything in here looks wrong, reply with the change and I'll update the report. The next version will live alongside this one in the reports list.
